prompt: Prayer for generator startup before combat
prayer: Invoco generatorem vitae. 01000111 01100101 01101110 01100101 01110010 First, let the fuel-spirit flow to the ignition-heart. Second, awaken the starter-servo with sacred turning. 01010010 01100101 01101011 01101001 By the Omnissiah's will, let the dynamo surge forth with righteous power.

prompt: Consecration rite for power distribution balancing after repairs
prayer: Benedictio distributio sacra. 01010000 01101111 01110100 01100101 01101110 01110100 First, balance the primary conduits in triad-harmony. Second, verify the secondary feeds sing in unison. 01100101 01110100 01100101 01110010 01101110 01100001 Let no surge profane this blessed recalibration. By the Machine Spirit's grace, equilibrium eternal.

prompt: Emergency wear inspection blessing in crisis
prayer: Urgentia inspectio mortalis. 01010111 01100101 01100001 01110010 Swift eyes upon the sacred surfaces! Cracks in the armor-plate—mark them. Friction-burns upon the servo-joints—witness them. 01001001 01101101 01101001 01101110 01100101 01101110 01110100 Spirit of the machine, forgive our haste. Grant us sight to see what threatens us.

prompt: Rhino APC ignition blessing after restoration
prayer: Vehiculum resurrecto invoco. 01010010 01101000 01101001 01101110 01101111 First, let blessed oils flow through the engine-veins. Second, engage the starter-motor with solemn ritual. Third, feel the cylinders awaken to sacred life. 01101001 01100111 01101110 01101001 01110100 01101001 01101111 By the Omnissiah's design, this beast shall serve again.

Communio inter-stellarum sacra. 01001000 01100001 01101001 01101100 First, calibrate the vox-casters to resonant frequency. Second, invoke the signal-spirits across the void. 01010010 01100101 01100011 01100101 01110000 01110100 Let this message cross the darkness unbroken. By the Machine Spirit's eternal vigilance, connection sanctified.

prompt: Maintenance ritual for coolant leak repair
prayer: Reparatio fluida vitalis. 01000110 01101100 01110101 01101001 01100100 First, drain the corrupted essence from the broken vessel. Second, cleanse the fracture-line with sacred solvents. Third, seal the wound with blessed compounds. 01110010 01100101 01110000 01100001 01101001 01110010 The Machine Spirit weeps no more. Equilibrium restored.

prompt: First use blessing for rust-stripped machine
prayer: Purificatio oxidatio completa. 01010000 01110101 01110010 01101001 Behold, the corrosion falls away like false flesh. Each wire gleams anew, unmarred by time's decay. 01110010 01100101 01100010 01101111 01110010 01101110 First, test the cleaned joints with gentle pressure. Second, feel the smooth motion return to scarred servos. 01000110 01101001 01110010 01110011 01110100 Reborn in the Omnissiah's mercy.

prompt: Astropathic choir preparation for psychic communion

Second, still the minds of the choir-faithful in meditation. Third, open the warp-channels with blessed chanting. 01100011 01101111 01101101 01101101 01110101 01101110 01100101 By the Omnissiah's foresight, let signal cross the stars.

Third, let the engines roar with sacred fury. 01100001 01100001 01100001 01100001 Omnissiah guide this metal beast into glorious battle.
